name: bera-annotation-copilot
description: A personal Obsidian annotation plugin for sidecar Markdown highlights and AI review packs.

scripts.install:dev: npm run build && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/install-dev.ps1
scripts.package: npm run build && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/package-release.ps1
